2606.12210.title: Can News Predict the Market? Limits of Zero-Shot Financial NLP and the Role of Explainable AI
2606.12210.paper_summary: Can financial news reliably predict short-term stock movements? Despite advances in large language models, this question remains unresolved. We revisit this problem using a zero-shot natural language processing framework, investigating whether models can extract actionable signals from financial news without domain-specific training. We design a structured pipeline that combines zero-shot natural language inference with temporal aggregation, explicitly modelling recency and event-dependent impact horizons when integrating information across articles. To address the need for transparency in high-stakes settings, we introduce a multi-layered explainability framework that links predictions to token-level, article-level, and aggregate evidence, and produces grounded natural language rationales. Across multiple models and prediction horizons, we find that zero-shot approaches consistently fail to outperform simple baselines, with particularly weak performance on negative movements, suggesting deeper structural limitations in mapping news sentiment to short-term price dynamics. However, explainability signals reliably distinguish between trustworthy and unreliable predictions, offering practical value even when accuracy is limited. These findings highlight the limits of zero-shot financial NLP and motivate a shift toward decision-support systems that prioritise transparency and uncertainty awareness. Code: https://github.com/alimert05/zero-shot-stock-xai
2606.12210.paper_summary_zh: 金融新聞能否可靠地預測短期股票走勢？儘管大型語言模型已經取得進展，這個問題仍然未得到解決。我們使用零樣本自然語言處理框架重新審視這個問題，調查模型是否能在沒有特定領域訓練的情況下從金融新聞中提取可行的信號。我們設計了一個結構化的流程，將零樣本自然語言推理與時間聚合相結合，在整合文章信息時，明確建模近期性和事件依賴的影響範圍。為了滿足高風險環境中對透明度的需求，我們引入了一個多層次的可解釋性框架，將預測與標記級、文章級和總體證據聯繫起來，並生成有根據的自然語言理由。在多個模型和預測範圍內，我們發現零樣本方法始終無法超越簡單的基準，尤其在負面走勢上表現特別弱，這表明在將新聞情緒映射到短期價格動態方面存在更深層的結構性限制。然而，可解釋性信號可靠地區分了可信和不可靠的預測，即使在準確性有限的情況下也提供了實際價值。這些發現突顯了零樣本金融自然語言處理的局限性，並促使我們轉向優先考慮透明度和不確定性意識的決策支持系統。代碼：https://github.com/alimert05/zero-shot-stock-xai
2606.12210.author: Ali M Karaoglu et.al.
2606.12210.authors: Ali M Karaoglu, Shreyank N Gowda
